text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Mmm, that fried chicken was delicious. ♪ It's so
splendid picking the food up with your hands and
chomping down. I'd quite like to do it ag—

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: You there! Don't drink that water!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
The water in that glass is for cleaning your hands.
It would be rather unhygienic to—

text_block_list.name: Security Captain
text_block_list.text:
Your Highness! I believe that is a drinking glass, not a
finger bowl.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
R-really?! Oh my... Please excuse me. My
ignorance has led to me causing a scene...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion's heart fills with remorse over her
misunderstanding.
